violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Center line prep cooler at 52-54F. Do not use until product is holding at 41F or below.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Need to replace broken filters on left grill.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Microwaves need cleaned inside and out.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -All shelving in kitchen needs cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean filters on left grill. -Dish washer hood needs cleaned.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. -Clean plates need to be inverted on cook line.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Multiple floor drains in kitchen and prep area are plugged and backed up.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor tiles are in poor repair.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling need cleaning in kitchen area.
